series_metadata.series_description: All bidding and supporting documentation including RFP’s, RFQ’s, proposals or similar documents (purchasing, construction, personnel services, etc.).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven (7) state fiscal years bid is awarded. when no longer of administrative value. No Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: seven (7) state fiscal years bid is awarded. when no longer of administrative value. No Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
